questions.question: Which dentists in Austin Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Austin Tx with weekend hours include: My Care Dental (Sat: 09:00-13:00), myDental at Tech Ridge (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Rivery Dental (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Toothwise Dental (Sat: 10:00-14:00). 4 total with weekend availability.
